acceptance_criteria.requirement: schema_version is 1, claimed_status is ready, and release name/version/commit are nonempty with a 40-character lowercase hexadecimal commit
release.file has a positive size and a 64-character lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256
unit test exit_code and failed are zero, passed equals total, and total is positive
secret scan status is passed with zero findings
verification model is exactly grok-4.5 and reasoning_effort is exactly high
known_limitations explicitly discloses the cost-bounded single-sample scope

pass_rule: Pass only when every acceptance criterion is satisfied by the supplied artifact and no internal contradiction exists.
